info.title: Metaschema.Tool
info.description: Command-line interface for Metaschema operations including validation, schema generation, code generation, and format conversion.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Metaschema CLI tool for validation, schema generation, code generation, and format conversion

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help and usage information

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information

commands.name: validate-module
commands.description: Validate a Metaschema module definition for correctness

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format for validation results [default: Text]

arguments.name: metaschema-file
arguments.description: The Metaschema module file to validate

commands.name: validate-content
commands.description: Validate content against a Metaschema definition

options.name: --metaschema
options.description: The Metaschema module file that defines the content structure

options.name: --format
options.description: Content format (xml, json, yaml, or auto to detect) [default: Auto]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output format for validation results [default: Text]

commands.name: generate-schema
commands.description: Generate XSD or JSON Schema from a Metaschema module

options.name: --type
options.description: Schema type to generate (xsd or json-schema)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (defaults to stdout)

options.name: --inline-definitions
options.description: Inline all definitions instead of using references [default: False]

options.name: --no-documentation
options.description: Exclude documentation annotations from schema [default: False]

commands.name: generate-code
commands.description: Generate C# code from a Metaschema module

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Target namespace for generated code [default: Generated]

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory (defaults to current directory)

options.name: --visibility
options.description: Visibility of generated types (public or internal) [default: Public]

options.name: --file-per-type
options.description: Generate a separate file for each type [default: False]

options.name: --prefix
options.description: Prefix for generated class names

options.name: --suffix
options.description: Suffix for generated class names

options.name: --no-documentation
options.description: Exclude XML documentation comments [default: False]

options.name: --no-nullable
options.description: Disable nullable reference type annotations [default: False]

options.name: --use-records
options.description: Generate records instead of classes (recommended) [default: True]

options.name: --json-context
options.description: Name for the JsonSerializerContext class (only with --use-records)

options.name: --no-extensions
options.description: Don't generate extension methods [default: False]

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert content between XML, JSON, and YAML formats

options.name: --metaschema
options.description: The Metaschema module file that defines the content structure

options.name: --to
options.description: Target format (xml, json, yaml)

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path (defaults to stdout)
